iso3c: # Steve Hanke's Troubled Currencies Project estimates (Johns Hopkins).
# Hanke uses free-market exchange-rate decay as an inflation proxy. His
# numbers are systematically higher than IMF/national official estimates
# because he captures the unofficial/black-market reality. CNN and other
# major outlets cite Hanke when reporting hyperinflation in crisis economies.
# various dates. Values are end-of-year annualized rates.
# Only populating for countries where Hanke's estimate diverges
